creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
I have a random screensaver enabled in KDE, so the problem persists
with all savers.
What happens: when idle timeout is reached, KDE launches saver and it
must hide mouse pointer (correct me if I wrong, maybe pointer must be
disabled by KDE?). This doesn't works: I can see pointer all the time
when saver is running (when unlock dialog isn't shown, of course).
Unfortunately, my system is just installed, so I don't know if this
problem is actual for previous versions.
